title: Ad Valorem Taxes: Exemptions and Payments
description: Conroe ISD follows rules about who qualifies for reductions on their local property taxes and how those taxes are paid. Certain homeowners — such as senior citizens, people with disabilities, or veterans — may be eligible for exemptions that lower the amount they owe. Because property taxes are a primary source of school funding, these guidelines help ensure the district collects revenue fairly while supporting those who qualify for relief.
